author: kpedro88
body:
#### PR description:

Address #14895 by automatically populating the list of Eras, Modifiers, and Modifier Chains from `Configuration/Eras` using Python's built-in reflection. Implementation this way requires minimal surgery elsewhere in CMSSW (i.e. configs that were importing `Eras.py` can continue to do so transparently, though this is no longer recommended). Reduce manual editing (and possible collisions) of these lists for fewer PR conflicts, streamlined development, and no unnecessary `checkdeps`.

One non-standard usage of Modifiers was identified after making this change and corrected.

#### PR validation:

Ran `runTheMatrix.py` and saw that `cmsDriver.py` runs successfully and creates configs.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

N/A
title: Automate Eras.py
